message:
fix(input): proper CDP keyboard handling with shift and modifiers

- Include all required CDP fields: text, unmodifiedText, key, code, windowsVirtualKeyCode, modifiers
- Add US keyboard shift mapping for numbers and symbols
- Translate Ctrl+A to Cmd+A for browser select-all
- Translate Ctrl+Shift+P to Cmd+Shift+P for VSCode command palette
- Upgrade Kitty keyboard protocol to flag 9 (report all keys)
